filesModified.purpose: Restructured fade masks into .swiper-slides-wrapper and added container padding
Added container padding to match PHP

fixesApplied.description: Created new .swiper-slides-wrapper div inside .swiper-parent that wraps only the .swiper element and fade mask divs. Removed 'relative' from .swiper-parent. The new wrapper has classes 'relative overflow-hidden grid grid-cols-1 grid-rows-1'. This isolates fade masks to only cover the slides area, not the pagination/navigation controls above.
Added 'py-16 md:py-24' to the container div in both PHP and TSX to achieve 96px inner padding within the charcoal background area at desktop (64px on mobile).

syncStatus.notes: Fade mask restructure only applies to PHP since TSX renders the swiper area via FilteredServerSideRender (SSR from PHP). Container padding (py-16 md:py-24) is synced in both TSX and PHP.

jsChanges.reason: No JS changes needed. querySelector calls are descendant queries that find fade masks regardless of nesting depth within .swiper-parent. MutationObserver on .swiper-parent still works correctly.
